reference: I suffer from bipolar disorder and bipolar depression. I am thirty-nine weeks pregnant and due to deliver any day, but I have not taken any medication for my bipolar condition, and I plan on breastfeeding my child. What can I do to control my bipolar symptoms while not on medication?
text: I suffer from bipolar disorder and bipolar depression. I am 39 weeks pregnant and due to deliver any day, but I have not taken any medication for my bipolar condition, and I plan on breastfeeding my child. What can I do to control my bipolar symptoms while not on medication?
